@graph.description: The experiment measured the impact of CPU load on temperature and power consumption. For the measurement, we used the SLICES RI with the three experiment nodes 'dagda', 'elva' and 'valga'. Each node ran stress-ng to generate CPU load while recording CPU temperature and energy consumption over time.
@graph.name: RISE Demonstration Experiment 1: Impact of CPU Load on Temperature and Power Consumption
